# Linear CLI

> A read-only command-line tool for fetching Linear ticket data as JSON. Designed for automation workflows, CI/CD pipelines, and scripting. Outputs structured JSON to stdout for easy processing with tools like jq.

Linear CLI provides powerful querying and filtering capabilities:
- List all accessible teams in a workspace
- List team members with contact information
- List recent issues in a specific team
- Filter issues by assignee (specific user or unassigned)
- Filter issues by date ranges (created, updated, or completed)
- Fetch complete issue details including comments, relations, parent/child hierarchy, and history

The CLI uses secure credential storage in `~/.config/linear-cli/credentials` and supports environment variables for CI/CD. It is strictly read-only and cannot modify any Linear data.

## Usage

```
linear                          # List all teams
linear members TEAM             # List team members
linear TEAM                     # List issues in team TEAM
linear TEAM @username           # Filter by assignee
linear TEAM @unassigned         # List unassigned issues
linear TEAM --created-after=YYYY-MM-DD    # Filter by date
linear TEAM-123                 # Fetch full details for issue TEAM-123
linear --key KEY                # Store API key
```

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/medeirosjoaquim/linear-cli/blob/main/README.md): Complete documentation with examples, output formats, and use cases

## Source Code

- [src/index.ts](https://github.com/medeirosjoaquim/linear-cli/blob/main/src/index.ts): CLI entry point with argument parsing
- [src/linear-client.ts](https://github.com/medeirosjoaquim/linear-cli/blob/main/src/linear-client.ts): Linear SDK wrapper with fetch functions
- [src/types.ts](https://github.com/medeirosjoaquim/linear-cli/blob/main/src/types.ts): Zod schemas for type validation
- [src/config.ts](https://github.com/medeirosjoaquim/linear-cli/blob/main/src/config.ts): API key management and credential storage
- [src/errors.ts](https://github.com/medeirosjoaquim/linear-cli/blob/main/src/errors.ts): Error types and exit codes

## Key Information

- **Language**: TypeScript (ES modules)
- **Runtime**: Node.js 22+
- **Package Manager**: pnpm
- **Main Dependency**: @linear/sdk for GraphQL API access
- **Output**: JSON to stdout, errors to stderr
- **Exit Codes**: 0 (success), 1 (config error), 2 (auth error), 3 (not found)
- **Filtering**: Supports assignee filtering (@username, @unassigned) and date range filtering (--created-after/before, --updated-after/before, --completed-after/before)
- **Date Formats**: ISO 8601 or YYYY-MM-DD

## Optional

- [package.json](https://github.com/medeirosjoaquim/linear-cli/blob/main/package.json): Dependencies and scripts
- [tsconfig.json](https://github.com/medeirosjoaquim/linear-cli/blob/main/tsconfig.json): TypeScript configuration
